Source: bemap-services-v2/traceroute/bemap-traceroute-quality.js

/**
 * BeNomad BeMap JavaScript API - TraceRoute quality helpers (v1.5)
 *
 * Pure-function utilities for grading the quality of a map-matched route.
 * The BeMap server does NOT emit a `qualityScore` field (there is no server-
 * side `QUALITY_SCORE` option in `TraceRouteOption.java`). The helper here
 * is a **client-side estimator** that derives a score from the average
 * straight-line distance between each input trace point and its snapped
 * waypoint — which is what most fleet apps actually need.
 *
 * When `route.extra.qualityScore` is present (consumer-supplied — e.g. an
 * upstream proxy enriches the response), it is used verbatim and the
 * estimator is skipped.
 *
 * @since 1.5.0
 */
bemap.traceRouteQuality = bemap.traceRouteQuality || {};

/**
 * Read the qualityScore the Worker returned, or compute a coarse estimate.
 *
 * The estimate is a value in [0,1] derived from the average distance
 * between each input trace point and its snapped waypoint:
 *
 *   < 5 m    → 1.0
 *   5–25 m   → linear ramp 1.0 → 0.5
 *   25–100 m → linear ramp 0.5 → 0.2
 *   > 100 m  → 0.0
 *
 * Returns null when the route has no waypoints with both an input and a
 * matched coordinate (typical for a fresh response without WAYPOINTS option).
 *
 * @public
 * @param {bemap.RoutingRoute} route
 * @return {Number|null}  in [0,1] or null if unknown.
 */
bemap.traceRouteQuality.score = function(routeOrResponse) {
    if (!routeOrResponse) return null;

    // Accept either a `RoutingResponse` (preferred — has `usedDestinations`
    // with both inputCoordinate and matchedCoordinate) or a `RoutingRoute`
    // (the latter only exposes matchedCoordinate via its waypoints).
    var extra = (typeof routeOrResponse.getExtra === 'function') ? routeOrResponse.getExtra() : null;
    if (extra && typeof extra.qualityScore === 'number') return extra.qualityScore;

    var waypoints = null;
    if (typeof routeOrResponse.getUsedDestinations === 'function') {
        waypoints = routeOrResponse.getUsedDestinations();
    } else if (typeof routeOrResponse.getWaypoints === 'function') {
        waypoints = routeOrResponse.getWaypoints();
    } else if (typeof routeOrResponse.getRoutingInstructions === 'function') {
        // RoutingRoute fallback — no input coordinates available.
        return null;
    }
    if (!waypoints || !waypoints.length) return null;

    // We need both input and matched coordinates to compute deviation. The
    // RoutingResponse.usedDestinations object only carries matchedCoordinate
    // (snap-back to the road) — for the estimator we'd need the caller to
    // also pass the originalRequest. When inputCoordinate is missing we
    // confidence-cascade via the `confidenceValue` server field instead.
    var confidenceSum = 0;
    var confidenceN = 0;
    var samples = 0;
    var totalM = 0;
    for (var i = 0; i < waypoints.length; i++) {
        var w = waypoints[i];
        if (typeof w.getConfidenceValue === 'function' && w.getConfidenceValue() !== null) {
            confidenceSum += w.getConfidenceValue();
            confidenceN++;
        }
        var input = (typeof w.getInputCoordinate === 'function') ? w.getInputCoordinate() : w.inputCoordinate;
        var matched = (typeof w.getMatchedCoordinate === 'function') ? w.getMatchedCoordinate() : w.matchedCoordinate;
        if (input && matched) {
            totalM += bemap.traceRouteQuality._haversineM(input, matched);
            samples++;
        }
    }

    // Prefer the deviation-based estimator when both coordinates are available.
    if (samples) {
        var avg = totalM / samples;
        if (avg < 5) return 1;
        if (avg < 25) return 1 - ((avg - 5) / 20) * 0.5;
        if (avg < 100) return 0.5 - ((avg - 25) / 75) * 0.3;
        return 0;
    }

    // Otherwise fall back to the server-provided per-waypoint confidence.
    if (confidenceN) return confidenceSum / confidenceN;

    return null;
};

/**
 * Great-circle distance in metres between two coordinates. Exposed as a
 * helper because callers occasionally want it too. Mean Earth radius
 * = 6 371 008 m (IUGG).
 *
 * @public
 * @param {bemap.Coordinate} a
 * @param {bemap.Coordinate} b
 * @return {Number}
 */
bemap.traceRouteQuality._haversineM = function(a, b) {
    var R = 6371008;
    function rad(deg) { return deg * Math.PI / 180; }
    var lat1 = (typeof a.getLat === 'function') ? a.getLat() : a.lat;
    var lat2 = (typeof b.getLat === 'function') ? b.getLat() : b.lat;
    var lon1 = (typeof a.getLon === 'function') ? a.getLon() : a.lon;
    var lon2 = (typeof b.getLon === 'function') ? b.getLon() : b.lon;
    var dLat = rad(lat2 - lat1);
    var dLon = rad(lon2 - lon1);
    var sinDLat = Math.sin(dLat / 2);
    var sinDLon = Math.sin(dLon / 2);
    var h = sinDLat * sinDLat
          + Math.cos(rad(lat1)) * Math.cos(rad(lat2)) * sinDLon * sinDLon;
    return 2 * R * Math.asin(Math.min(1, Math.sqrt(h)));
};
